EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER PURSUANT TO CA CCP 485.010 FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALENCIA, ARTURO

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-28-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE IMMEDIATELY. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY APRIL 28, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
